records.ety: [OD. kronie, karonie, an old sheep, OF. carogne, F. charogne, carrion (also F. carogne ill-natured woman.). See Carrion, and Crony.]

defs: An old woman; -- usually in contempt.
quotes: But still the crone was constant to her note.

defs: An old man; especially, a man who talks and acts like an old woman.
quotes: The old crone [a negro man] lived in a hovel, . . . which his master had given him.
A few old battered crones of office.
